title: oxydectes glabella
intro: Oxydectes glabella, also known as the yellow bird's tongue or yellow bird tongue, is a flowering plant native to South America, belonging to the family Acanthaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Oxydectes glabella include its potential to reduce fever, treat respiratory infections, and alleviate symptoms of gastrointestinal issues. Oxydectes glabella can be prepared as a tea or infusion by infusing the leaves in hot water, or as a tincture by extracting the plant's active compounds in a solvent.
